EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IMainRingLayout

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control the Main Ring layout.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("8F15D4EE-202B-4B5A-B714-ED384E527CA9")]
public interface IMainRingLayout : INetworkDiagramLayout

Properties

AbsoluteUnit

Indicates whether the values set for the spacing parameters are interpreted as absolute units.

bool AbsoluteUnit { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

BreakPointPosition

Indicates the percentage number that defines the relative position of the break point on the last segment of the diagram edges; that is, on the diagram edge segment parallel to the main line.

double BreakPointPosition { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

EdgesType

Indicates if the diagram edges must display either with right angles, curved geometry, or no refinement.

esriLayoutEdgesType EdgesType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriLayoutEdgesType

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsActive 

bool IsActive { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Name 

string Name { get; }

Property Value

string

Offset

Indicates the distance used to separate diagram edge segments that are overlapping. This parameter is only used when EdgesType is esriLayoutOrthogonalEdge.

double Offset { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

PreserveContainers 

bool PreserveContainers { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

PropertySet 

IPropertySet PropertySet { get; }

Property Value

IPropertySet

RingHeight

Indicates the height of the main ring.

double RingHeight { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

RingType

Indicates the type of the main ring form; that is, rectangle or ellipse.

esriLayoutMainRingType RingType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriLayoutMainRingType

Examples

Sample Snippet

RingWidth

Indicates the width of the main ring.

double RingWidth { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SubTreeAlongSpacing

Indicates the spacing between the diagram junctions that display along the tree direction; that is, the spacing between a diagram junction belonging to the (n) hierarchical level and a diagram junction belonging to the (n+1) hierarchical level.

double SubTreeAlongSpacing { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SubTreePerpendicularSpacing

Indicates the spacing between the diagram junctions that display perpendicularly to the tree direction; that is, the spacing between the diagram junctions that belong to a same hierarchical level.

double SubTreePerpendicularSpacing { get; set; }

Property Value

double

Examples

Sample Snippet

SubtreeType

Indicates how the trees coming out of the main ring's junctions are positioned.

esriLayoutHierarchicalType SubtreeType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriLayoutHierarchicalType

Examples

Sample Snippet

Version 

int Version { get; }

Property Value

int
